title: Identify parts of 3D shapes
description: Identify faces, bases, edges, and vertices on 3D shapes.

assessment_items.question_content:
**How many edges does the following shape have?**

![A rectangle-based pyramid.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/fa7931664d96029553705144302f95fde6ccb0bc)

[[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints:
$\blueD{\text{Edges}}$ are the line segments where two faces intersect.

![A rectangle-based pyramid. The 4 edges along the base and the 4 edges joining the vertices of the base to the apex of the pyramid are shaded.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/46db8ae5df7c97fb284c09a49db294c1b8abcc54)
The figure has $\blueD8$ edges.

assessment_items.question_content:
**How many edges does the following shape have?**


[[☃ image 1]]



[[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints:
$\blueD{\text{Edges}}$ are the line segments where two faces intersect.


[[☃ image 1]]
The figure has $\blueD8$ edges.

options.alt: A rectangle based pyramid. There are 4 edges along the base and 4 edges joining the vertices of the base to the apex of the pyramid.The hidden edges are dashed lines.

assessment_items.question_content:
**How many edges does the following shape have?**


[[☃ image 1]]



[[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints:
$\blueD{\text{Edges}}$ are the line segments where two faces intersect.


[[☃ image 1]]
The figure has $\blueD{12}$ edges.

options.alt: A right rectangular prism. There are 8 vertices and 12 edges. There are 6 faces and each face is a rectangle. The figure's width is greater than its height. The hidden edges are dashed lines.

assessment_items.question_content:
**How many faces does the following shape have?**



[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints:
$\greenD{\text{Faces}}$ are the flat surfaces on 3D shapes.

The shape has a face on the top and bottom:



[[☃ image 1]]

And $3$ faces around the sides:


[[☃ image 2]]

The figure has a total of $\greenD5$ faces.

options.alt: A triangular prism. There are 6 vertices and 9 edges. There are 5 faces. 3 of the faces are rectangular and 2 of the faces are triangular. The hidden edges are dashed lines.

**How many faces does the following shape have?**


[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints:
$\greenD{\text{Faces}}$ are the flat surfaces on 3D shapes.

The shape has a face at the front and back:


[[☃ image 1]]

And $3$ faces around the sides:


[[☃ image 2]]

The figure has a total of $\greenD5$ faces.

options.alt: A triangular prism. There are 6 vertices and 9 edges. There are 5 faces. 3 of the faces are rectangular and 2 of the faces are triangular. The hidden edges are dashed lines.

assessment_items.question_content:
**How many vertices does the following shape have?**


[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints:
$\purpleD{\text{Vertices}}$ are the points where edges meet. 



[[☃ image 1]]
The figure has a total of $\purpleD6$ vertices.

options.alt: A right triangular prism. There are 6 vertices and 9 edges. There are 5 faces. 3 of the faces are rectangular and 2 of the faces are right triangles. The hidden edges are dashed lines.
